_comment: Format: 'GuestName::YYYY-MM-DD': 'cold open phrase'. Use when the RSS regex can't parse the cold open (e.g. answered in another language, non-standard phrasing, or the strict parser over/under-captures). Values are transcribed verbatim from the official episode description.
JB Smoove::2021-01-04: like Conan's taking advantage of him
Liam Neeson::2023-08-28: wants to sing, but a bit nervous
Luke Wilson::2022-08-29: on the advice of his counsel
Howard Stern::2019-05-20: badly about not being his friend
